content:
EY India is hiring for Change Manager (Procurement & Digital Transformation)

Location: PAN India
Experience: 3 to 5 years
NP: Max 30days

Required Skills
* 3–5 years of OCM, transformation, or consulting experience.
* Experience with ERP, procurement, or digital transformation programs.
* Strong communication, stakeholder management, and facilitation skills.
* Experience developing training and communication materials.
* Proficiency in Microsoft PowerPoint, Excel, and Word.

Preferred Experience
* Procurement, S2P/P2P, or supply chain transformation.
* Exposure to GEP SMART, SAP Ariba, Coupa, or Oracle Fusion.
* Experience working with global clients and cross-functional teams.

Interested candidates can share their CV at deblina.sen@in.ey.com along with below details (must)

Current Co:
Current Location:
NP/LWD (if serving):

Nishant Rrai Akshay Chavan Mayur Ramesh Deshpande
comment: OCM roles in procurement transformations often hinge on real S2P/P2P exposure; tool knowledge (Ariba/SAP) helps, but measurable adoption outcomes usually decide fit
